Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soul Cloak]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon named a new technique 'The Soul Cloak'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — The Soul Cloak technique allows strength to wait until needed and makes movements smooth and easy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Soul Cloak is a technique that swirls around the user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses the Soul Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon used the Soul Cloak to climb a cliff.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — The Soul Cloak is a fluid blue-white light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The Soul Cloak allows Lindon to feel his Truegold pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Soul Cloak sprung up around Lindon as he ran.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — The Soul Cloak was used by Lindon when he was a Gold.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Soul Cloak is a blue-white haze of energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon attempted to localize the Soul Cloak to his arm while using the Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon kindled the Soul Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — The Soul Cloak provides control over movements and the Underlord body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon uses Soul Cloak to slip aside an attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Soul Cloak is a technique that provides speed and grace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Soul Cloak provides strength and control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses Soul Cloak to change his movement style.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon would have to abandon or re-work the Soul Cloak to adopt Hollow King madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon used ideas from The Seven Principles of Pure Madra to create the Soul Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Soul Cloak is a technique Lindon uses to leap across the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Soul Cloak is a blue-white aura/technique used by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — The Soul Cloak is a technique Lindon can build around himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon's Soul Cloak rose up.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Soul Cloak allows Lindon to run at full speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Soul Cloak sprang up around Lindon.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue can accelerate herself with the Soul Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon used the Soul Cloak to propel himself after a spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — The Soul Cloak is economical to use even while sparing madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon used the Soul Cloak to defend against an axe.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon caught a gigantic claw with the strength of the Soul Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Soul Cloak is a technique that manifests as a smooth, blue-white flame from the user's whole body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Soul Cloak is a technique suggested by Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon used a Soul Cloak-powered punch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Little Blue used the Soul Cloak to catch blows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — A Soul Cloak can be powered by Lindon's madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
